summary:
Dehaka's Zerg units are all Primal variants of their regular counterparts. While they are more expensive, they are better in almost every way. Two Primal Zerg units can undergo Primal Combat to convert into a single evolved Primal Unit. However, Dehaka's greatest strength comes from his hero unit that levels up as he gathers Essence from fallen enemies. Combined with the buffs he gains based on Devoured enemy tags, his Hero unit can solo entire missions if played well, with only the support of his calldown Pack Leaders.

Dehaka is an easy commander to play but rewards intensive micro. Expert Dehaka players have no troubles dealing with the largest of attack waves by utilizing a high-leveled Dehaka to take engagements and debuff enemy units.
